title: A7MD's Blood Moon
body:
## **🌕 Blood Moon Resource Pack 🌕**

**Witness the rise of a haunting crimson moon with this Blood Moon Resource Pack!**

**This simple yet effective pack replaces Minecraft’s default moon with a glowing red variant, adding a touch of mystery and danger to the night sky.**

---
## _**✨ Features:**_
 **✔️ Blood-Red Moon Texture – A chilling new look for the moon.**
 
 **✔️ Keeps Vanilla Aesthetic – Only the moon is changed, leaving the rest of the game untouched.**
 
 **✔️ Compatible with All Texture Packs – Works seamlessly with other resource packs.**
 
 **✔️ No Performance Impact – A lightweight change with no FPS drops.**
 
---
## _**🌙 How to Install:**_

 **Download the pack (.zip file).**
 
 **Move it to your resourcepacks folder.**
 
 **Enable it in Minecraft Settings > Resource Packs.**
 
 **Enjoy the eerie glow of the Blood Moon!**

 ---
**Perfect for horror maps, survival worlds, or just a spooky aesthetic! 🌑🔴**
